options.name: -clock_trees
options.description: Restricts the report to the specified clock trees

options.name: -delay_corners
options.description: Filter for a specific constrained delay corner. Default all ((delay_corner)+, optional)

options.name: -drv_types
options.description: {transition max_cap max_source_to_sink_net_length} Filter to choose what types of violation to report on. Default all

options.name: -early
options.description: Only report on the early half of the delay corners

options.name: -exclude_violation_types
options.description: {dont_touch_nets pre_routed_nets} Choose to exclude certain nets if they are known to be not fixable. Default, include everything

options.name: -file
options.description: Save a copy of the contents of the report to the specified file name

options.name: -late
options.description: Only report on the late half of the delay corners

options.name: -num_nets
options.description: Specify for how many nets the detailed reporting should report on. Default 10

options.name: -views
options.description: Restricts the report to the delay corners associated with the specified views ((analysis_view)+, optional)
